common.label: Label
common.recurring_edit_msg: Do you want to apply this change to all occurrences of this recurring flow or only to this one?

entities.title: Entity Management
entities.subtitle: Separate your private, shared or professional finances.
entities.error_linked: Cannot delete an entity linked to accounts or transactions.

dashboard.title: Strategic Steering
dashboard.cash_drag_msg: You have {{amount}} of stagnant excess in your checking accounts (beyond your 1.5-month needs). This capital is "sleeping" instead of working.

net_worth.definition: It's the sum of everything you own (Accounts, Savings, Real Estate, Stocks) minus everything you owe (Credits, Debts).
net_worth.usage: This is the ultimate indicator of your real wealth. The goal is to see it grow over the long term, either through savings or asset appreciation.

runway.definition: The number of months you can maintain your current standard of living solely with your available savings, if your income were to stop tomorrow.
runway.usage: A runway of 3 to 6-months is considered a solid 'Emergency Fund'. Below that, you are vulnerable. Above that, you might have too much cash sitting idle.

budget_health.definition: A golden rule for structuring income: 70% for Needs (Fixed + Daily), 20% for Wants (Leisure), and a minimum of 10% for Savings.
budget_health.usage: If your needs exceed 70%, you lack maneuverability. If your savings are under 10%, your wealth growth is too slow.

ffi.title: Sovereignty (FFI)
ffi.definition: The Financial Independence Index measures what percentage of your vital expenses (Rent, Bills) is covered by your passive income (Rents, Dividends).
ffi.usage: At 100%, you are free: you no longer need to work to pay your essential bills. This is the goal of financial sovereignty.

dna.title: Income DNA
dna.definition: Analyzes the source of your money: Active Income (linked to your time/work) vs. Passive Income (linked to your assets/investments).
dna.usage: The goal is to diversify your DNA to reduce dependence on salary and increase the share of income decorrelated from your time.

safe_to_spend.definition: The amount you actually have left for 'fun' spending this month, once all your fixed bills and recurring templates are deducted.
safe_to_spend.usage: If this number is positive, you can spend with peace of mind. If it's negative, you're dipping into your savings without knowing it.

balance_sheet.definition: Visualizes the ratio between your Net Equity (what you truly own) and your Debts (what belongs to the bank).
balance_sheet.usage: The goal is to increase the blue part (Owned) over the months by paying off your loans and accumulating assets without going into debt.

language.title: Language
language.subtitle: Select your preferred language.
language.why: Switches the entire interface between French and English.

currency.subtitle_master: All transactions and accounts are managed in this unit.
currency.why_master: Having a single currency allows aggregating your income and expenses consistently without rate distortion.
currency.subtitle_rates: Define the value of your currencies relative to your master currency.
currency.why_rates: Allows converting your foreign assets (Stocks, Crypto) into real value in your primary currency.

horizon.title: Steering Horizon
horizon.subtitle: Define the temporal scope of your financial vision.
horizon.why: Determines how far Strady projects your recurring flows to calculate your future balance.

strategy.title: Strategic Parameters
strategy.subtitle: Configure your dashboard targets.
strategy.why: These settings adjust the health indicators (gauges) to match your risk profile.
strategy.ef_help: Defines the multiplier used for the 'Emergency Fund' gauge on your Steering. Generally, 3 to 6 months of current expenses are recommended.

vault.title: The Vault
vault.subtitle: Ownership and portability of your data.
vault.why: Allows you to keep a local copy of your data or migrate them to another account.
vault.import_help: Strady CSV format only. Duplicates will be automatically managed.

maintenance.title: System Maintenance
maintenance.subtitle: Destructive actions and logout.
maintenance.why: Deep cleaning tools if you want to start from scratch or test a new configuration.
maintenance.reset_starter_help: Deletes your data and reinstalls the standard family configuration (recommended for testing).
maintenance.reset_wipe_help: PERMANENTLY deletes your entire workspace. Start from scratch.

notifications.horizon_invalid: Start date must be before end date.
notifications.horizon_boundary: End date cannot exceed the functional limit ({{boundary}}).

display.month_selector_pos_why: Allows you to optimize the space based on your navigation habits. At the bottom, it's closer to your fingers on mobile; at the top, it anchors the view.

transactions.title: Cash-Flow & Forecast
transactions.error_empty_fields: Please fill in all required fields.
transactions.error_both_external: Source and destination cannot both be empty.
transactions.error_before_creation: Transaction cannot be created before account creation date.

education.title: Financial Philosophy
education.subtitle: Become the CFO of your own life.

tour.title: New to Strady?
tour.subtitle: Let our assistant show you the key features in 1 minute.

pyf.title: Pay Yourself First
pyf.desc: Don't think of savings as 'what's left at the end of the month'. Savings is your **first bill**.
pyf.app: Create a **Recurring Template** for a transfer to your savings account scheduled on the **2nd of the month**.

rule.title: The 70/20/10 Rule
rule.desc: A healthy structure for distributing your net income:
rule.app: Track the **Budget Health** gauge on your strategic dashboard.

emergency.title: The Safety Net
emergency.desc: Before investing, build a reserve of **3 to 6 months of expenses**. This is your 'F*ck You Money' that protects your serenity.
emergency.app: Strady calculates your **Runway** in real-time based on your real burn rate.

cash_drag.title: Avoiding Cash Drag
cash_drag.desc: Money sitting in a checking account loses value (inflation). Every euro above your safety net should be invested.
cash_drag.app: Check the **CFO Opportunity** alert when your operational accounts are too full.

ffi.title: Sovereignty Index (FFI)
ffi.desc: The **Financial Independence Index** mesure your freedom. It represents the percentage of your **Fixed Expenses** (Rent, Bills) covered by your **Passive Income** (Dividends, Rents received). At 100%, you are sovereign: your assets pay your vital bills, even if you stop working.
ffi.help: Mark your income as 'Passive' in the Categories tab to activate this KPI.

guide.title: User Guide
guide.step1_desc: Start by creating your real Accounts. For each account, specify if it's a savings account (for Runway calculation).
guide.step2_desc: In the Flows tab, create your Templates. Salary, Rent, Internet... Strady will automatically generate these flows for the next 36 months. Your financial future becomes visible immediately.
guide.step3_desc: Once a week, compare your Strady balance with your banking app. Use the "Adjust balance" button in the Accounts tab to correct discrepancies (coffees, surprises).
guide.step4_desc: On the last day of the month, click "Close month". Strady will freeze the data and carry over your exact balances as the new starting point for the following month.

mastery.title: Mastery Missions
mastery.subtitle: Level up your financial skills through interactive challenges.
mastery.mission1_desc: Master the art of forecasting and budget automation.
mastery.mission2_desc: Build and track your long-term assets and net worth.
mastery.mission3_desc: Manage private, shared, and business finances with ease.

onboarding.title: Choose your first Mission
onboarding.subtitle: Which part of your financial life do you want to master first?

budget.title: Alice & Bob's Setup
budget.message: Alice and Bob use categories to segment their lives: 'Shared Bills' for their common expenses and personal categories for their own leisure.

budget.title: Shared Treasury
budget.message: They use a Joint account for common bills, while Alice and Bob keep their own personal checking accounts for individual freedom.

budget.title: Automated Flow
budget.message: Salaries come in, and recurring templates automatically handle their shared electricity, water, and insurance payments.

budget.title: Shared Contributions
budget.message: Every month, Bob sends his share of the housing costs from his personal account to the Shared Joint account via an internal transfer.

budget.title: Total Visibility
budget.message: The result? Their 36-month trajectory is crystal clear. They know exactly how much they can spend today while securing their future.

wealth.title: Tracking Assets
wealth.message: Alice and Bob own their principal residency, valued at €350,000. It's their primary engine for long-term wealth.

wealth.title: Managing Debt
wealth.message: They also track their car loan and mortgage. Reducing these liabilities is their path to financial independence.

wealth.title: Net Worth Vision
wealth.message: Their Dashboard shows their true Net Worth: the sum of their house and savings minus what they still owe to the bank.

entities.title: Structuring Worlds
entities.message: Alice and Bob start in **Settings** to define their financial worlds: 'Alice', 'Bob', and their 'Shared' household.

entities.title: The Master Filter
entities.message: Once created, the **Entity Switcher** in the sidebar becomes their command center. Changing it filters the entire application instantly.

entities.title: Segmented Treasury
entities.message: In the **Accounts** tab, they only see the wallets belonging to the selected world. Bob's personal savings stay out of the Shared view.

entities.title: Clean Cash-Flow
entities.message: Transactions are also isolated. Alice can review her personal 'Leisure' spending without the noise of the family mortgage.

entities.title: Distributed Assets
entities.message: Even **Wealth** is segmented. The principal residency is 'Shared', while Bob's car loan is his own personal liability.

interactive_setup.title: 1. The Bucket
interactive_setup.message: Let's create your first category. Think of it as a 'bucket' for your money. Try adding 'Housing' or 'Food'.

interactive_setup.title: 2. The Source
interactive_setup.message: Great. Now, where does your money live? Create your primary bank account (e.g., 'Main Checking').

interactive_setup.title: 3. The Automation
interactive_setup.message: Final step. Let's link them. Create a **Recurring Template** for your Rent or Salary to see your 3-year future.

interactive_setup.title: Welcome Aboard
interactive_setup.message: Your personalized Starter Pack is ready. Explore your dashboard to see your financial speed and runway.

success.category_created: Great! You've just created a budgetary 'bucket'. Now you can steer exactly where your money goes.
success.transaction_created: Aha! By adding this template, Strady has automatically projected your balance for the next 3 years. You are now a pilot.
success.asset_created: Asset added! Your balance sheet is growing. This is your first step toward real financial independence.
success.snapshot_created: Perfect. Updating your values allows Strady to calculate your 'True North' (Net Worth) accurately.
success.entity_created: Entity created! You've just separated your financial 'worlds'. Clarity is your new superpower.
success.transfer_created: Transfer complete! You've just performed a 'salary' virement between entities. Mental load: Zero.
success.setup_bucket: Bucket created! You've started building your financial structure. Every euro now has a home.
success.setup_account: Account linked! Strady now knows where your cash is stored.
success.setup_engine: Engine Started! Your 36-month trajectory is now alive. You are officially a Strady Pilot.

wealth.title: Wealth & Balance Sheet
wealth.subtitle: Asset tracking and debt reduction
wealth.balance_desc: Net Worth represents your real wealth (Assets - Debts). Each loan repayment decreases your liabilities and mechanically increases your net worth, even if your savings remain stable.
wealth.no_assets: No assets recorded for this period.
wealth.no_liabilities: No liabilities recorded for this period.
wealth.fill_required: Please fill in all required fields.

dashboard.title: Strategic Steering
dashboard.purpose: This screen is your financial control tower. It aggregates your data to give you a clear vision of your overall financial health and real spending capacity.
dashboard.action1_desc: Track the evolution of your real wealth (Cash + Assets - Debts).
dashboard.action2_desc: Ensure you have enough reserve to cover expenses in case of the unexpected.
dashboard.action3_desc: Compare your real spending pace against your income.

transactions.title: Flows & Forecasts
transactions.purpose: Steer your current operations and anticipate the future. Strady projects your income and expense models to show your financial trajectory.
transactions.action1_desc: Record a one-time expense or create a recurring template.
transactions.action2_desc: Analyze your expenses by type (Fixed, Daily Life, Leisure).
transactions.action3_desc: Get a graphical view of money inflows and outflows.

wealth.title: Wealth Management
wealth.purpose: Track your long-term assets and debts. This view allows you to move beyond the monthly budget to manage your overall wealth growth.
wealth.action1_desc: Record real estate, brokerage accounts, or loans.
wealth.action2_desc: Periodically update your asset values for an accurate Net Worth calculation.
wealth.action3_desc: Visualize the trajectory of your wealth over the long term.

accounts.title: Treasury Management
accounts.purpose: Configure your real bank accounts. This is where you define your financial starting points (initial balances) for each account.
accounts.action1_desc: Add your checking, savings, or investment accounts to track their balances.
accounts.action2_desc: Adjust the app balance to exactly match your bank.
accounts.action3_desc: Record a money transfer between two of your accounts without affecting your overall budget.

categories.title: Analysis & Categories
categories.purpose: Categories are the labels you put on your money. Properly configuring them allows Strady to accurately calculate your budgetary health.
categories.action1_desc: Change icons, colors, and names of your categories to reflect your life.
categories.action2_desc: Check 'Passive Income' so your dividends or rents feed your Sovereignty Index.
categories.action3_desc: The order defined here will be used to display your tables and charts.

education.title: Philosophy & Guide
education.purpose: Strady is not just a technical tool, it's a method. Learn the principles of financial sovereignty to transform your relationship with money.
education.action1_desc: Discover 70/20/10, Pay Yourself First, and the FFI index.
education.action2_desc: Learn the 4 key steps to steering your budget like a pro.
education.action3_desc: Restart the guided tour to review basic features.

settings.title: System Settings
settings.purpose: Personalize your Strady experience. Manage display preferences, backups, and account security.
settings.action1_desc: Define how far ahead you want to see your financial forecasts.
settings.action2_desc: Create a security backup or transfer your data to another device.
settings.action3_desc: Switch between French and English for the entire interface.

confirm.delete_wealth: Do you want to permanently delete {{label}} and all its history?
confirm.edit_recurring: You are modifying a recurring transaction. This will delete the old series and create a new one with these parameters. Continue?
confirm.edit_tx: Are you sure you want to modify this transaction?
confirm.delete_recurring: Do you want to delete this recurring transaction AND all linked transactions? (Irreversible action)
confirm.delete_tx: Are you sure you want to delete this transaction?
confirm.logout: Are you sure you want to log out?
confirm.reset_all: Are you sure you want to delete ALL accounts and ALL transactions? This action is irreversible.
confirm.reset_tx: Are you sure you want to delete ALL transactions? Accounts will be kept. This action is irreversible.
confirm.factory_starter: WARNING: This will delete ALL your current data to reinstall the Starter Pack. Are you sure?
confirm.factory_wipe: IRREVERSIBLE ACTION: This will PERMANENTLY delete all your data (Accounts, Transactions, Categories). You will start from scratch. Are you sure?
confirm.close_month: Are you sure you want to close the month of {{month}}? This action is irreversible.
confirm.delete_cat: Are you sure you want to delete this category?
confirm.delete_acc: Are you sure you want to delete this account and ALL its associated transactions?
